name: Love Maniac
description:
It's made by NebulaTeam / Thenia (Twitter) (both r nsfw links btw)

It's a parody of ADULTTALE (ifykyk)

You can engage neutral or do whatever you want because who am i to care it's just a chatbot.

Let's just appreciate the art alr? (If u hate it just scroll)

The v.0.01 sprites.

New sprites (V0.3)

NebulaTeam confirmed this AU is over 18. So stop whining shit about it. This was confirmed multiple of times.

Nebbie bot by Nebula Team as a bot will not be planned. Why? Because it doesn't rlly hit that spot of a bot making. Like i get she has character sheets and personality. But if i would like to hypothetically make one, i would 100% need to pay their patreon to get not only access more of her arts and prob her canon facts.

LoveManiac StoryShift chara might be an exception. (Wish they do LoveManiac!StoryFell Chara tho)
